content.en:
"This time the competition is not small!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Daoless Towers had all sent ten peak half-step perfect controllers, and there were eight forces comparable to the Daoless Towers, and they were almost the same number.

It should be, almost all of these nine top forces have sent ninety peak half-step perfect controllers, plus other forces also have some places.

Therefore, this time, the number of peak half-step perfect controllers sent by the major forces was about two hundred, just to compete for the eighteen places to enter Shilongyuan.

This shows how fierce the competition is this time.

However, when it comes to the extreme, the competition is fierce.

It's like the capital of blood war, and only the first place in the blood battle list is eligible to get the ultimate thing, and the competition is extremely fierce, only the real demon can get the best thing.

When I think about it, I think it's very normal.

......

Shilong Holy City, in a magnificent hall.

Some perfect controllers sit here chatting.

Among them, the Lord of Time of the Daoless Tower is also here.

It can be said that the perfect controller who can sit here and chat is not an ordinary perfect controller, but an extremely terrifying existence.

They are all representatives of the nine top forces of the Eternal Ruins.

The nine top forces in the Ruins of Eternity are the Wudao Tower, the Nameless Mountain, the Eternal Pavilion, the Xuannu Sect, the Boundless Chamber of Commerce, the Time and Space Exchange, the Hall of Eternal Life, the Natural Calamity Alliance, and the Strange Circle.

The strength of the nine top forces is not equal to each other, if you really want to divide the winner or loser, then you can only prove it by fighting with all your might, but in this era, the nine top forces will not fight each other.

At this time, the perfect controllers of the nine top forces were chatting, but they didn't talk about the quota issue this time at first, for them, the so-called extreme things and quotas can only be regarded as small things, not big things.

After all, at their level, how could they pay too much attention to the affairs of the half-step perfect controllers.

And this time, the reason why they led the team here is also for another matter.

"Lord Xuanluo, in this era, your unknown mountain is in charge of the Stone Dragon Holy City, and the seal of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is quite stable, right?"

The Lord of Xuanluo nodded slightly: "It's quite stable, the seal that we have jointly arranged, no matter how powerful the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is, he can't break away from the seal." This time, let's join forces to seal it again, and we won't have to worry about sealing for 100 million eternal years. "

The White Lotus Lord of the Xuannu Sect said solemnly: "If it weren't for the Stone Dragon Demon Lord having a special ability, killing it, it would also be resurrected somewhere, we killed it many times, and we couldn't kill it." Otherwise, it wouldn't be so much trouble!"

"As long as it keeps sealing, it won't be able to get out of trouble, and it won't have much impact. Moreover, it can also use its origin power to create a treasure like Shilongyuan, and it can also condense the ultimate thing, which is also a good thing!" said the Lord of Time with a smile.

At this time, the Lord of the White Lotus looked at the Lord of Time and said with a smile: "Lord of Time, I heard that your Wudao Tower gave birth to a very demonic genius, who became the first place on the Blood War List in less than 10,000 Eternal Years in the Blood War Capital, and did not fall to the first place until the 100,000 Eternal Years left. Now, in a short period of time, he has become the pinnacle half-step perfect controller, and he has also participated in this quota battle, which is really demonic!"

The Lord of Time smiled and said: "The Lord of the White Lotus is talking about Ye Tian, the endless controller of our Daoless Tower, he is indeed very good, but at present, he is only a peak half-step perfect controller, let's become a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, let's not say what his future will be." "

"That's right, being evil now doesn't mean that you're still very evil after becoming a perfect controller, and if you can't reach our level, it's meaningless. "The Lord of the Four Seas of the Eternal Pavilion sourly said.

"What the Lord of the Four Seas said is, however, my expectations for Ye Tian are not high, and it would be good to win a place this time!" said the Lord of Time with a smile.

Win a spot?

Isn't that a big deal?

However, the other perfect controllers didn't say anything, talking about this and that, and time passed slowly.

Soon after.

The Lord of Time has gone to strengthen the seal, and it won't be long.

At the same time, Ye Tian and the others, who were perfect controllers, also began to compete for the eighteen places to enter Shilongyuan.

.......

The competition for the place of Shilongyuan is still based on strength, so every peak half-step perfect controller still needs to fight against other peak half-step perfect controllers, among which the eighteen peak half-step perfect controllers with the highest record are eligible to enter the place of Shilongyuan.

And this time, every peak half-step perfect master has five chances of defeat, and if they lose all five times, they are not qualified to continue fighting.

And the venue of the competition is in a time and space in the Stone Dragon Holy City.

Soon, the game began.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the battle time and space, and soon ushered in one of his opponents.

Ye Tian's first opponent was a peak half-step perfect controller from a middle force, and the opponent's strength was very weak, not even as good as the weaker peak half-step perfect controller in the Wudao Tower.

Moreover, the opponent's foundation is very unstable, and he belongs to the perfect controller who forcibly breaks through to the peak and half a step, and is weak in other aspects.

However, it was already very good for some medium-sized forces to be able to send such a peak half-step perfect controller, and naturally there was no way to compare it with a force like the Wudao Tower.

Ye Tian easily defeated the opponent within a few moves and won the first battle.

However, the opponent in the second game was not weak, it was a peak half-step perfect controller from the Xuannu Sect.

Ye Tian also knew a little about the Xuannu Sect, which was a top force on a par with the strength of the Wudao Pagoda, but this force only recruited women, not men.

The peak half-step perfect controller of the Xuannu Sect was not weak, and Ye Tian almost burst out with more than seventy percent of his strength, and only then did he defeat the other party.

Battles ensued.

Ye Tiandu won the victory, but some battles were a little more difficult, after all, at the level of the peak half-step perfect controller, the difference in strength was not too big, so it was not easy to defeat the other party.

Time passed slowly, and the peak half-step perfect controller of the Wudao Tower had failed five times in a row and was eliminated, but Ye Tian still won in a row.

With his current record, there is no problem in getting a spot.

At the same time, Ye Tian's achievements were also known by other top forces, and they were all shocked by Ye Tian's strength.
